buggy_variants.description: Evicts when size reaches capacity, so window holds at most capacity-1 after some pushes.
Min queue uses >=, losing duplicate minima and breaking min after popping one duplicate.
pop_oldest removes newest element instead of oldest, corrupting order-dependent behavior.
stats returns integer floor average instead of true float division.
Allows zero capacity by only rejecting negatives.
Eviction subtracts current x from sum instead of removed oldest.
stats on empty returns zeroed dict instead of None.
